item.title: Version 2.0.2
item.description:
Drippy 2.0.2

Hi, it's me, Drippy! I used to do my drip animation while your screen was locked, meaning you'd never actually see it if you were away from your computer! In this update, I now wait for you to come back first, then WOW you with my free-fall. I also made it easier to delete your hydration entries, in case you accidentally logged one and need to undo it. K love you bye!
